specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Shipshape, Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We work with boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing hands-on expertise and a genuine commitment to quality marine craftsmanship to every job we take on.

Our team specializes in a comprehensive range of marine services designed to cover your boat from the waterline down to the bilge and everywhere in between. Whether you need a thorough boat survey and inspection before a purchase or insurance renewal, professional diving and underwater services to handle hull work without a haul-out, marine AC and climate control system installation and repair to keep your cabin comfortable in the Florida heat, or marine plumbing and sanitation work to keep your onboard systems running clean and code-compliant — we handle it all under one roof.

At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We serve recreational boaters, liveaboards, and working vessel owners across South Florida, including communities along the Intracoastal Waterway, Biscayne Bay, and the Florida Keys. Whether you're docked in a marina or anchored out, we're built to bring reliable marine service to wherever you and your boat happen to be. Our goal is straightforward: do the work right, communicate clearly, and make sure you can get back on the water with confidence.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us to schedule service today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey and inspection covers the structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment aboard your vessel — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers an accurate picture of a boat's true condition. We conduct thorough pre-purchase surveys, insurance surveys, and condition-and-value assessments following recognized marine surveying standards. Having a qualified inspection on record protects your investment and can save you from costly surprises down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services allow us to inspect, clean, and repair hull surfaces, running gear, props, and through-hulls without the time and expense of a full haul-out. We handle hull cleaning, zinc anode replacement, propeller removal and inspection, and underwater damage assessment for vessels of all sizes. Keeping your running gear and bottom in good shape directly impacts fuel efficiency, performance, and long-term hull integrity.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including self-contained marine AC units, chilled-water systems, and ventilation setups designed for the demands of a marine environment. Proper sizing, refrigerant handling, and seawater cooling circuit maintenance are critical to keeping these systems running efficiently and reliably. Whether it's a new installation or a system that's lost its cooling capacity, we diagnose the problem and get it sorted.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from raw water intake systems and bilge pump installations to holding tanks, marine heads, Y-valves, and macerator pumps — all built to meet USCG and MARPOL discharge regulations. We troubleshoot and repair leaks, replace aging hoses and fittings, and upgrade sanitation systems to keep your boat compliant and odor-free. Properly maintained marine plumbing protects both your vessel and the waterways you cruise.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and condition-and-value inspection for buyers
Insurance marine survey documenting vessel systems and safety equipment
Hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement via underwater diving service
Propeller inspection and removal without hauling the vessel out
Marine air conditioning system installation or refrigerant recharge
Holding tank and marine head replacement for sanitation compliance
Through-hull fitting inspection and raw water plumbing system repair
